---
title: "Lab2"
author: "Eleanore Brugh"
date: "2026-03-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(tmap)
```

```{r}
 counties <- sf::read_sf("C:/R/Data/CBW/County_Boundaries.shp") %>%
  sf::st_make_valid()
```

```{r}
dams <- sf::read_sf("C:/R/Data/CBW/Dam_or_Other_Blockage_Removed_2012_2017.shp") %>%
  sf::st_make_valid()
```

```{r}
streams <- sf::read_sf("C:/R/Data/CBW/Streams_Opened_by_Dam_Removal_2012_2017.shp") %>%
  sf::st_make_valid() 
```

```{r}
bmps <- read_csv("C:/R/Data/CBW/BMPreport2016_landbmps.csv")
```


#names/scores 
```{r}
t.names <- tibble(key = c(1, 2, 3), 
             name = c("Huey", "Dewey", "Louis"))
```
```{r}
t.scores <- tibble(name = c("Louis", "Huey", "Dewey"),
                   grade = c(99, 45, 33))
```
#join
```{r}
t.joined <- left_join(t.names, t.scores, by = "name")
t.joined
```
